assertions.reason: No disallowed console.* calls outside installer entry points and plugin hot path uses ctx.client?.app?.log?.(...)

evidence.observation: rg exit 1 with no output indicates zero disallowed console.* matches outside installer files.
Found plugin runtime logging via optional-chained client app log calls. Output: src/tools.ts:24:	ctx.client?.app?.log?.(entry); | src/index.ts:21:	(ctx as PluginLogContext).client?.app?.log?.({

assertions.reason: package.json version is valid SemVer-like and greater than 0.1.10.

evidence.command: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const m=v.match(/^(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)(?:[-+].*)?$/); const base=[0,1,10]; let gt=false; if(m){const cur=[+m[1],+m[2],+m[3]]; gt=cur[0]>base[0]|| (cur[0]===base[0]&& (cur[1]>base[1] || (cur[1]===base[1]&&cur[2]>base[2])));} console.log(JSON.stringify({version:v,semverLike:Boolean(m),gt_0_1_10:gt})); process.exit(m&&gt?0:1);"
evidence.observation: Version check JSON confirms semver validity and precedence > 0.1.10. Output: {"version":"1.0.0","semverLike":true,"gt_0_1_10":true}

assertions.reason: CHANGELOG exists, is tracked, and latest release section matches version/date with Added/Changed/Breaking headings.

evidence.observation: CHANGELOG.md is tracked by git. Output: CHANGELOG.md

evidence.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('./package.json'); const ch=fs.readFileSync('./CHANGELOG.md','utf8'); const m=ch.match(/^## \\[(.+?)\\] - (\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})/m); const topVersion=m?.[1]??null; const date=m?.[2]??null; const firstSectionStart=m?m.index + m[0].length:0; const nextHeadingIdx=ch.slice(firstSectionStart).search(/^## \\[/m); const latest=nextHeadingIdx===-1?ch.slice(firstSectionStart):ch.slice(firstSectionStart, firstSectionStart+nextHeadingIdx); const hasAdded=/^### Added\\b/m.test(latest); const hasChanged=/^### Changed\\b/m.test(latest); const hasBreaking=/^### Breaking(?: Changes)?\\b/m.test(latest); const ok=Boolean(topVersion===p.version && date && hasAdded && hasChanged && hasBreaking); console.log(JSON.stringify({packageVersion:p.version,topVersion,date,hasAdded,hasChanged,hasBreaking})); process.exit(ok?0:1);"
evidence.observation: Latest changelog section check passed for version/date and required headings. Output: {"packageVersion":"1.0.0","topVersion":"1.0.0","date":"2026-04-18","hasAdded":true,"hasChanged":true,"hasBreaking":true}

assertions.reason: Release install/uninstall scripts reference canonical .config path and keep legacy path handling in guarded compatibility branches.

evidence.observation: Canonical .config plugin path appears in both release scripts. Output: scripts/release-uninstall.sh:4:CANONICAL_PLUGIN_PATH="${HOME}/.config/opencode/plugins/flow.js" | scripts/release-install.sh:6:CANONICAL_PLUGIN_PATH="${HOME}/.config/opencode/plugins/flow.js"
Legacy path use is confined to conditional compatibility/fallback blocks. Output: {"installHasCanonical":true,"uninstallHasCanonical":true,"installLegacyGuard":true,"uninstallLegacyGuard":true}

assertions.reason: Bundle keeps @opencode-ai/plugin as external reference and does not inline createOpencodeClient symbol.

evidence.observation: Bundle symbol/external reference check passed. Output: {"hasCreateOpencodeClient":false,"hasPeerRef":true}

assertions.reason: README documents canonical .config install path and migration section with legacy path confined there.

evidence.observation: README path and migration-section checks passed. Output: {"hasCanonical":true,"hasMigrationHeader":true,"hasLegacyInMigration":true,"legacyMentionCount":1,"allLegacyInsideMigration":true}

assertions.reason: No indented schema declarations in runtime/schema.ts; cross-area test verifies stable schema object identity across separate imports.

evidence.observation: rg exit 1 with no output indicates no function-scoped (indented) const *Schema = z.* declarations.
Module-scope schema identity test file exists.

Test file contains re-import and identity assertions (toBe) for runtime schemas. Output: 6:		const reimported = await import("../../src/runtime/schema"); | 8:		expect(reimported.SessionSchema).toBe(runtimeSchema.SessionSchema); | 9:		expect(reimported.PlanSchema).toBe(runtimeSchema.PlanSchema);

frictions: Contract sample for VAL-RELEASE-008 references semver package, but Node could not resolve semver in this environment; used deterministic built-in Node semver-like comparator instead.
